tasks.label: check-fetcher-config
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT \"configurationItem\", \"configurationItemValue\" FROM iplist.configuration WHERE \"configurationItem\" in ('fetcherEnabled','applicatorEnabled') ORDER BY 1;"

tasks.label: enable-fetcher
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "UPDATE iplist.configuration SET \"configurationItemValue\"='1' WHERE \"configurationItem\"='fetcherEnabled'; SELECT \"configurationItem\", \"configurationItemValue\" FROM iplist.configuration WHERE \"configurationItem\"='fetcherEnabled';"

tasks.label: restart-fetcher-enabled
tasks.command: docker compose restart fetcher && docker logs --since 2m --tail 200 mikrotik-whitelist-service-fetcher-1

tasks.label: rebuild-services-domain-feature
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --build --force-recreate api fetcher applicator

tasks.label: check-domain-tables
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT to_regclass('iplist.\"domainLists\"'), to_regclass('iplist.domains');"

tasks.label: alembic-upgrade-head
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api alembic upgrade head

tasks.label: check-domain-tables-after-migrate
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT to_regclass('iplist.\"domainLists\"'), to_regclass('iplist.domains');"

tasks.label: rebuild-after-fk-fix
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --build --force-recreate api fetcher applicator

tasks.label: check-alembic-current
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api alembic current

tasks.label: check-domain-tables-final
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT to_regclass('iplist.\"domainLists\"'), to_regclass('iplist.domains');"

tasks.label: alembic-current-now
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api alembic current

tasks.label: domain-tables-now
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT to_regclass('iplist.\"domainLists\"'), to_regclass('iplist.domains');"

tasks.label: create-test-domainlist
tasks.command: curl -sS -i -X POST http://localhost:8000/domainlists/new -d "url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hagezi/dns-blocklists/main/domains/tif.txt" -d "flagUserDefined=0" -d "listType=1" -d "description=Test Domain Feed" -d "comment=auto test" -d "fetchFrequencyHours=24" -d "flagInactive=0" -d "ttlDays=7" | head -n 20

tasks.label: latest-test-domainlist-id
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id,url,\"listType\" FROM iplist.\"domainLists\" WHERE description='Test Domain Feed' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;"

tasks.label: query-domain-resolved-count
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iplist.domains WHERE \"domainListsId\"=1 AND \"flagInactive\"=0;"

tasks.label: query-domain-sample-rows
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT \"domainName\",\"ipAddress\" FROM iplist.domains WHERE \"domainListsId\"=1 ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;"

tasks.label: create-resolvable-domainlist
tasks.command: curl -sS -i -X POST http://localhost:8000/domainlists/new -d "url=https://paste.rs/1vq8a" -d "flagUserDefined=0" -d "listType=2" -d "description=Resolvable Domain Feed" -d "comment=validation" -d "fetchFrequencyHours=24" -d "flagInactive=0" -d "ttlDays=7" | head -n 20

tasks.label: get-resolvable-domainlist-id
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id FROM iplist.\"domainLists\" WHERE description='Resolvable Domain Feed' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;"

tasks.label: query-resolvable-count-id2
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iplist.domains WHERE \"domainListsId\"=2;"

tasks.label: query-resolvable-samples-id2
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT \"domainName\",\"ipAddress\" FROM iplist.domains WHERE \"domainListsId\"=2 ORDER BY \"domainName\",\"ipAddress\" LIMIT 20;"

tasks.label: api-logs-domain-complete
tasks.command: docker compose logs --tail=120 api | rg "Domain fetch complete|domainListsId|WARNING|ERROR"

tasks.label: api-logs-domain-complete-grep
tasks.command: docker compose logs --tail=200 api | grep -E "Domain fetch complete|domainListsId|WARNING|ERROR" | tail -n 40

tasks.label: verify-deny-membership-via-applicator
tasks.command:
docker compose exec -T api python - <<'PY'
import ipaddress
from app.services import applicator
entries = applicator.get_combined_entries()[2]
networks = [ipaddress.IPv4Network(cidr, strict=False) for cidr, _ttl in entries]
checks = [
    '140.82.113.3',
    '104.20.23.154',
    '172.66.147.243',
    '64.233.185.100',
]
print('entry_count', len(entries))
for ip in checks:
    addr = ipaddress.IPv4Address(ip)
    print(ip, any(addr in n for n in networks))
PY

tasks.label: cleanup-validation-domainlists
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "DELETE FROM iplist.\"domainLists\" WHERE description IN ('Test Domain Feed','Resolvable Domain Feed'); SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iplist.\"domainLists\" WHERE description IN ('Test Domain Feed','Resolvable Domain Feed');"

tasks.label: check-existing-domainlists
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -F '|' -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id,url,\"lastSync\",\"flagInactive\",\"flagUserDefined\",\"listType\" FROM iplist.\"domainLists\" ORDER BY id;"

tasks.label: api-logs-domain-id3
tasks.command: docker compose logs --tail=200 api | grep -E 'domainListsId|Domain fetch|Domain fetch attempt failed|DNS resolution failed' | tail -n 80

tasks.label: query-domainlist-id3-status
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -F '|' -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id,\"lastSync\",(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iplist.domains d WHERE d.\"domainListsId\"=3) FROM iplist.\"domainLists\" WHERE id=3;"

tasks.label: recheck-domainlist-id3-progress
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -F '|' -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id,\"lastSync\",(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iplist.domains d WHERE d.\"domainListsId\"=3) FROM iplist.\"domainLists\" WHERE id=3;"

tasks.label: domainlist-id3-progress-after-fix
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -F '|' -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id,\"lastSync\",(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iplist.domains d WHERE d.\"domainListsId\"=3) FROM iplist.\"domainLists\" WHERE id=3;"

tasks.label: recent-apply-history
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -F '|' -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id,\"firewallsId\",status,\"startedAt\",\"completedAt\",\"whitelistCount\",\"blacklistCount\" FROM iplist.\"applyHistory\" ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;"

tasks.label: apply-history-after-manual
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -F '|' -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id,\"firewallsId\",status,\"startedAt\",\"completedAt\",\"whitelistCount\",\"blacklistCount\" FROM iplist.\"applyHistory\" ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;"

tasks.label: api-apply-logs
tasks.command: docker compose logs --tail=120 api | grep -E 'Apply attempt failed|Address lists unchanged|firewallsId|complete|failed' | tail -n 60

tasks.label: test-collapse-snippet
tasks.command:
docker compose exec -T api python - <<'PY'
from app.services.applicator import _collapse_entries
samples = [
    ('10.0.0.0/24', 7),
    ('10.0.0.1/32', 7),
    ('10.0.0.2/32', 7),
]
print('covered_by_parent_same_ttl', _collapse_entries(samples))
range_entries = [(f'192.168.1.{i}/32', 7) for i in range(256)]
print('full_24_from_32s', _collapse_entries(range_entries))
partial_entries = [(f'192.168.2.{i}/32', 7) for i in range(1, 256)]
print('partial_not_widened_count', len(_collapse_entries(partial_entries)))
print('partial_not_widened_head', _collapse_entries(partial_entries)[:5])
PY

tasks.label: collapse-demo
tasks.command:
docker compose exec -T api python - <<'PY'
from app.services.applicator import _collapse_entries
sample_full = [(f'192.168.0.{i}', 7) for i in range(256)]
sample_partial = [(f'192.168.1.{i}', 7) for i in range(1, 256)]
sample_mixed = [('10.0.0.0/24', 7), ('10.0.0.5/32', 7), ('10.0.0.6/32', 3)]
print('full_range', _collapse_entries(sample_full))
print('partial_range', _collapse_entries(sample_partial)[:10], 'count=', len(_collapse_entries(sample_partial)))
print('mixed', _collapse_entries(sample_mixed))
PY

tasks.label: recent-apply-history-after-fix
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -X -A -F '|' -t -U mikrotik -d mikrotik -c "SELECT id,\"firewallsId\",status,\"startedAt\",\"completedAt\",\"whitelistCount\",\"blacklistCount\" FROM iplist.\"applyHistory\" ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;"

tasks.label: api-apply-complete-logs
tasks.command: docker compose logs --tail=120 api | grep -E 'Apply complete|Apply failed|Apply attempt failed|firewallsId' | tail -n 40
